summary: Comprehensive testing of RBAC Permissions, Discount Management, Stock Transfers, Sales Dashboard (Delivery, Reports, CRM), and Invoice System completed. All 27 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified all major features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Authentication login (200 OK)
Backend: List users for RBAC
Backend: List custom roles
Backend: Create custom role
Backend: Update user permissions
Backend: Get permission modules
Backend: List item discounts
Backend: Create item discount (all items)
Backend: Create item discount (selected items)
Backend: List BOGO offers
Backend: Create BOGO offer
Backend: List tiered discounts
Backend: Create tiered discount with multiple tiers
Backend: List stock transfers
Backend: Create stock transfer
Backend: Approve stock transfer
Backend: Receive stock transfer
Backend: Get pending receipt transfers
Backend: Dashboard stats
Backend: Recent sales
Backend: Low stock items
Backend: List invoices
Backend: Get invoice settings
Frontend: Dashboard loads with 3 Quick Actions (POS, Items, Inventory)
Frontend: RBAC Permissions page - Two-column layout with Users and Permissions
Frontend: RBAC - Role-Based vs Custom Permissions mode selector
Frontend: RBAC - User Permissions and Role Templates tabs
Frontend: Stock Transfers page - Transfer list with status badges
Frontend: Stock Transfer Receive modal - Item list with Expected/Received columns
Frontend: Stock Transfer Receive - +/- buttons for quantity adjustment
Frontend: Stock Transfer Receive - Match/Discrepancy status indicator
Frontend: Discount Manager - Item Discounts, BOGO, Tiered tabs
Frontend: Discount Manager - 'Applies To' column with All Items badge
Frontend: Discount Manager - New Item Discount modal with All Items/Selected Items options
Frontend: BOGO tab - Buy X Get Y offers displayed
Frontend: Tiered Discounts - Multiple tiers displayed (₹100 OFF, ₹300 OFF, 10% OFF)
Frontend: Delivery Management - KPI cards (Total Orders, Pending, In Transit, Delivered)
Frontend: Delivery Management - Delivery table with status and delivery person columns
Frontend: Sales Reports - KPI cards (Total Revenue, Total Orders, Customers, Products Sold)
Frontend: Sales Reports - Daily Trend chart
Frontend: Sales Reports - Payment Methods tab
Frontend: CRM - Customer segments (VIP, Loyal, Regular, Inactive)
Frontend: CRM - Customer table with Segment badges and Points
Frontend: Invoices - KPI cards (Total Invoices, Total Paid, Total Due, Overdue)
Frontend: Invoices - Actions dropdown with View, Print, PDF options
critical_code_review_comments: RBAC Permissions page has clear two-column UI with Role-Based vs Custom mode selector
Stock Transfer Receive flow properly shows Expected/Received columns with +/- buttons and Match status
Discount Management supports Item Discounts, BOGO, and Tiered discounts with item selection
Sales Dashboard pages (Delivery, Reports, CRM) all functional with proper KPI cards and data tables
Invoice System has Print/PDF functionality in actions dropdown
Dashboard Quick Actions correctly shows only 3 buttons (POS, Items, Inventory)
seed_data_creation: Created test discounts (item, BOGO, tiered) and stock transfers during testing - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All recently implemented features tested and working: RBAC Permissions with role-based/custom mode, Stock Transfer Receive flow, Discount Management (Item/BOGO/Tiered), Sales Dashboard pages (Delivery, Reports, CRM), Invoice System with PDF/Print. Backend has 27 passing tests in /app/backend/tests/test_rbac_discounts_transfers.py.
